title: Toyrific Jump N Bounce Kids Space Hopper, 20 Inch Retro Bouncing Ball with Easy Grip Handles, Outdoor or Indoor Exercise Toy for Ages 3+, Smiley Yellow Design
features: RETRO SPACE HOPPER: A classic kids bouncing ball in a bright eye catching design that brings back the feel of the original space hopper and gives children a fun active way to play.
STRONG AND DURABLE: Made from tough long lasting material that can handle energetic indoor or outdoor play while supporting riders up to 50kg with confidence.
EASY GRIP HANDLES: Fitted with secure comfortable handles that help children keep their balance as they jump, bounce, race and explore new ways to move.
GREAT FOR EXERCISE: Encourages healthy active play by helping kids build balance coordination and strength, while enjoying an exciting jumping toy.
READY FOR FUN: Quick to inflate and easy to carry so children can enjoy instant play at home in the garden at the park or anywhere they want to bounce.
description: From the manufacturer Bouncy Hopper Bounce into endless fun with the Jump ‘n’ Bounce Ball Space Hopper! The smaller bouncing ball is perfect for beginners wanting to begin their bouncing fun! The Jump ‘n’ Bounce Ball features easy grab handles for safe bouncing and the soft rubber material makes it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use! Quick Inflation The ideal bouncy hopper for indoor and outdoor play. Thanks for the durable vinyl material this ball is for long term use. Grab Handles The inflatable carry handles are ideal for kids to feel safe when they are bouncing around. Making this healthy exercise and fun! Suitable for Ages 3+ The bottom of the ball is secured with anti-slip material for the ultimate protection at all times!
